name: quizpulse
description: QuizPulse — real-time live quiz platform (React + Node.js + Socket.IO)

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.build:all: npm run install:all && npm run build
scripts.render-build: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build
